data.title: Solayer launches the Jade Debit Card on the native chain, supporting global consumption and enjoying 4% US Treasury yields
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solayer has officially launched the native chain Jade Debit Card, which supports online and offline consumption and international payment settlement in more than 100 countries including the United States. The card is bound to Solayer's native stable currency sUSDC, and users can enjoy 4% US Treasury bond returns. Cardholders can also participate in the second phase of the points plan and have the opportunity to receive future rewards from cooperative projects.

data.title: Binance will adjust the minimum price change unit of multiple U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum price change unit (TickSize) of 20 U-based perpetual contracts including VOXELUSDT and MBOXUSDT at 14:00 (Beijing time) on April 17, 2025. Please refer to the announcement for the specific adjustment values. This adjustment will not affect existing orders. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: ZKsync founder responds to security incident: no code or key leaked, full investigation results will be released
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ZKsync founder and Matter Labs CEO Alex Gluchowski posted on social media, reiterating that there was no code, contract or operator key leakage in the protocol, and said that ZKsync has withstood the test because of its ultimate security architecture (Endgame). The team is still investigating the relevant security incidents, and will release detailed information after the investigation and recovery work are completed.
Alex said that he started the investigation as soon as he received feedback from the community. He added that although the prices of most Layer2 project tokens have been under pressure recently and ZKsync has performed relatively steadily, the team still has an inviolable and legally binding commitment to investors, partners and members.

data.title: GMGN launches Meme news preview and real-time pool monitoring functions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN announced the launch of two new features: First, users can achieve millisecond-level sniping of Meme coins on the platform. Hovering the feather icon with the mouse can view the content of the tweet without jumping to the X platform; second, a new "Pool" tab is added to the token details page, which can monitor the pool dynamics in real time to determine whether there is any insider trading or liquidation. 
Specifically, it includes: judging whether the project party is absorbing funds or shipping by checking the addition and subtraction of the unilateral pool; the changes in the bilateral pool help to determine whether the token is at the bottom or top range. The new function aims to improve the transaction efficiency and risk identification ability of users in the Meme market.

data.title: Ripple CTO issues public warning after suspicious post from John Deaton raises hack concerns
data.description:
Ripple Labs' Chief Technology Officer, David Schwartz, has issued a public alert following a suspicious post from John Deaton.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-cto-warns-on-deaton-post/

data.title: Potential Vulnerabilities Found in Crypto-MCPs, Expert Warns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Chromia's Head of Data and AI, superoo7, has highlighted potential vulnerabilities in most Crypto-MCPs. These weaknesses could allow hackers to redirect user transactions to their own wallets via the Cursor and Anthropic's Claude platform. The issue stems from 'poisoned' MCPs, which users may be unaware of. Superoo7 advises using trusted MCP servers, minimizing funds in wallets, and employing the MCP-Scan tool for protection.

data.title: It is suspected that the same whale address spent $5 million to buy 630,000 TRUMP, with an average opening price of $7.93
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @lookonchain monitoring, about 8 hours ago, two newly created wallet addresses (suspected to be controlled by the same whale) spent a total of US$5 million USDC to buy 630,339 TRUMP tokens at an average price of US$7.93.

data.title: Galaxy Digital has transferred a total of 37,500 ETH to Binance in the past four days, worth more than 60 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @spotonchain monitoring, Galaxy Digital transferred 12,500 ETH to Binance again about 8 hours ago, which is about 20.31 million US dollars at the current price. In the past 4 days, Galaxy Digital has transferred a total of 37,500 ETH to the exchange, with a total value of about 60.34 million US dollars, and the average transfer price is $1,609.

data.title: Planet Morning News
South Korea blocks 14 crypto exchanges—What’s behind the crackdown?
data.description:
South Korea plans more crackdown on non-compliant crypto exchange sites and applications.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/south-korea-blocks-14-crypto-exchanges-whats-behind-the-crackdown/
